title: Income Approach: The income approach to real estate valuation primarily considers the...
summary: Apply the income approach to real estate valuation.
prompt: The income approach to real estate valuation primarily considers the current market value of the property based on its potential rental income.
solution: True. The income approach to valuation is a common method used in real estate to assess a property's value based on its ability to generate income. This approach typically involves calculating the Net Operating Income (NOI) and applying a capitalization rate (cap rate) to determine the property's value. It is essential for investors to understand this approach as it directly impacts investment decisions and pricing strategies.
